info.name: Demos Platform Mobile API
info.description: Mobile-friendly Postman collection for Sanctum auth and the full API surface.

request.description: Create a user and trigger a 6-digit email verification code for the mobile onboarding flow.
Submit the emailed 6-digit code and save the returned bearer token.
Request a fresh verification code after the resend cooldown expires.
Create a Sanctum token for a verified mobile user and save it into collection variables.
Requires a logged-in user whose account has been location verified.
Requires a verified user and 50-70 words of amendment text.
Complete onboarding with the manual location fields shown in the Figma flow.

body.raw:
{
  "country": "United States",
  "state": "District of Columbia",
  "district": "Washington",
  "street_address": "1600 Pennsylvania Avenue NW",
  "zip_code": "20500"
}

request.description: Complete onboarding with device coordinates from the auto-detect location screen.
